# Domain Harness Risk Checklist

## Development

- Tests, lint, typecheck, and security review are identified.
- Runtime or integration verification is listed when static review is insufficient.
- Secrets and environment variables are not hardcoded.

## Non-Development

- Source requirements and citation expectations are explicit.
- Personal data handling and approval flow are explicit.
- Tone, brand, and stakeholder constraints are explicit.
- Speculative claims are prohibited unless labeled as assumptions.

## Mixed

- Code and document outputs have separate verification criteria.
- MCP, hooks, and subagents are opt-in and separately approved.
